jobPayouts.note: Engine-clamped income (ECONOMY.md). The narrator picks the tier; the ENGINE rolls the credits inside the band. A successful negotiation check the same turn shifts the roll to the upper half of the band; a failed one to the lower half. Direct model credit grants above flavorGrantCap are clamped.

damageRules.note: Failed hazard checks / danger saves deal rng(0..hazardBase) × hazardLevel. Level 1-5, shown to the player as ⚠ on the option BEFORE they commit: ⚠1 scrape (max 2) … ⚠5 deadly (max 10 — can one-shot a fresh 10-HP character). Ability checks (non-hazard skills) never deal damage on failure.

tickRule.note: Only DC 13+ rolls with real stakes earn ticks. Routine departures/dockings/short hops NEVER tick. Max 1 tick per skill per scene.
